message:
Welcome to Too Good To Be True, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Use `/help` at any time for a list of useful links and commands*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin Start button
Clicked org button
test severity p2
*Incident Number INC100025:* test severity p2
Clicked Start button
Welcome our new IM @Gowtham Kumar Reddy B, Happy to have you in the team. Hope you get comfortable with everyone
:alarm_clock: - You have 25 minutes to resolve the outage, good luck! You can type `/help` if you need any reminders.
Welcome @Gowtham Kumar Reddy B
Nice to meet you @Gowtham Kumar Reddy B
There are a few strange customer reports with the helpdesk
Apparently, the site is loading slowly
People are reporting that they can't make payments either
customer_reports
@Gowtham Kumar Reddy B Can you check this?
Hi Bob, can we have more details on customer relate reports
Let me gather the information for you
There are more than 300 customer reports till now
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
Calls are from every region, likely to be Global
There's a bunch of messages coming in. A few people saying they can't do anything on the site
Let me know if you need more information
yes, i to see site is down lets drill down the logs and add the engineer
:star: Reproduces the incident
:star: Facts over opinion
Daniel can we have the logs and the cause which is causing issue
Looking into this and trying to replicate the issue
I am able to replicate the issue. Checking the logs now
:star: Ask team members to provide evidence of their assertions
I see a lot of errors, most of them are context initialisation errors
Logs
Yes replicated the issue and even i'm seeing similar errors in frontend logs
I have a stake holders meet in next 10 minutes, @Gowtham Kumar Reddy B do you think this can be resolved by then?
:bulb: Declare an incident.
let raise p1 incident
Below are the changes implemented this morning
p1
*Incident Number INC100035:* p1
:star: Incident record created
:star: Send first comms in first 5 minutes
deployments
How many customers are affected? Are the reports coming in from all regions?
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
If you want more information, check out Incident Manager dashboard for more details: <https://grafana.prod.uptimelabs.io/d/aOf5yan4z/incident-management>
i see 300 customers affected
HI Bez, we are trying to mitigate the issue can we have join in the online-boutique-5664 bridge to analyse
we keep update you shortly, we are trying to bring back the site to online
thanks, keep me in the loop
Tanya Daniel Shay, can we have the quick on the tickets assigned you let have update
There are no alerts on the Infrastructure. I did see a few errors on the frontend apps
:star: Manage actions and timings
This looks to me like an issue in the frontend pod
I have verified Payments change (CHG89347), there are no errors and the service is up and healthy
Checkout service change(CHG89350) is in UAT, so not affecting PROD. But I see a few errors from Frontend pods
All the errors started right after the change (CHG89349) on the Frontend
The customer complaints are rising. @Gowtham Kumar Reddy B Do we have an ETA for resolution?
What is the latest on this?
yes Bobwe are working on the issue we will resolve very shortly
the issue with frontend
A Frontend change caused by change CHG89349 has brought down the Frontend pods
But this functionally worked when I tested
Even if it worked in your test environment, something's behaving differently in prod, maybe a config mismatch or unhandled edge case
Can you give a quick update on the status?
yes, there may environment issue diffure with prod
what should we do?
Daniel can we have fix?
not sure if a fix will work, we could rollback the change
this should be a quick fix
yes, lets bring back to previous version lets try for quick fix
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
Sorry, I've never done a rollback in PROD before, can someone help me with the steps?
I will help you, @Shay. Rolling back now
Daniel Hamed S can you help
I have rollbacked Frontend:version to 10.1.0 to more stable version. Can somebody verify?

To 'verify' that the resolution has worked and to close the incident you must: 
--Validate the fix yourself or with the team:white_check_mark: 
--Cross check resolution with Customer Support:white_check_mark: 
--Confirm resolution in the 'Business-comms' channel:white_check_mark:
Customers are able to place the orders, complaint calls have reduced as well.
Daniel thank you some much for quick fix
Thank you team alot
Hi Bez, issue is fixed customer able order all looks good thank you!!
It's definitely working again!
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Wow that was intense!
Thanks! for resolving it quickly
Good job guys
Yes well done! that could have gone much worse so props to everyone
We will have a Post-Incident Review (PIR) to understand what happened

Thank you for playing, We recommend that you take 5 minutes to go and get a drink or stretch your legs.
Once you are back we ask that you complete this retrospective and feedback form, just hit I am ready when you want to start. I am ready button
Clicked Start_feedback button
Submission successful
